top_signals.title: BHP Takes $2.3 Billion Potash Charge as Costs Jump Again
top_signals.summary: BHP Group will take a $2.3 billion writedown on its giant Jansen potash mine, after announcing the latest in a series of cost and time overruns for an expansion of the project in Canada.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Odd Lots: Jeremy Grantham on Spotting a Bubble’s End (Podcast)
top_signals.summary: Jeremy Grantham, co-founder and long-term strategist of GMO, has a long history of calling bubbles. As he recounts in his new memoir, The Making of a Permabear: The Perils of Long-Term Investing in a Short-Term World, that includes spotting the dot-com bubble of the early 2000s, which some people see as analogous to the current excitement over AI. And when it comes to today’s market, there are a lot of signs of frothiness you could point to. In this episode, we speak to Grantham about how he see
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: D-Wave Announces World’s First Gate-Model Quantum Computing Simulator for Error-Aware Programming
top_signals.summary: New offering to help developers prototype applications, model quantum processor behavior and explore advanced workflows as they prepare for access to forthcoming D-Wave™ gate-model systems
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Jeremy Grantham on How to Tell If a Bubble Is About to Burst
How Gráinne Wafer Is Modernizing Guinness
top_signals.summary: Diageo Global Category Director Gráinne Wafer reflects on her personal connection to the Guinness brand and the challenge of keeping an almost 270-year-old icon relevant for a new generation of drinkers.  (Source: Bloomberg)

top_signals.title: Predicting the future, one Japanese grammar point at a time
top_signals.summary: From fortune tellers to weather forecasts and prediction markets, learn how Japanese expresses uncertainty.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Spanish GP organizers confident new Madrid track will be ready despite hurdles
top_signals.summary: The Spanish Grand Prix is scheduled for Sept. 13.
